T3 per-user vehicle AGGREGATION proven (multi-vehicle synthetic fixtures; never first-vehicle); rank+cap-3+never-empty fallback battery (healthy user => Discovery/Loyalty)
T4 notification engine: deadline triggers fire on vehicle date fixtures; templates CORRECTED with documented source-misalignment dispositions; alignment validated at load

T7 receipts every turn (decision, firing_rule per pick, confidence, pack_id, image_sha); graded-cooper zero second-brain on ordinary rows
T8 scans (client-data bodies, secrets, demo strings) clean; both suites green offline; BUILD cooper record or park-on-MAIN fallback with ready-note

constraints: fires via RADIO contract AFTER the cael-os-light Part-1 harness (Phase 0) is built
the converged prep is the INPUT, do NOT start from 0
eligibility-gate = the pluggable-gate analogue of P1 RBAC
evidence_refs: VERIFIED shape: P2 = the P1 architecture with the rule-set swapped -> an ELIGIBILITY gate (vehicle state x 12-service eligibility rules) instead of RBAC. Same pluggable deterministic-gate primitive; validates the harness gate engine.

KILLER finding (verified by inspection): the recommendation is a deterministic function of USER STATE, not the question - every repeated user in the 40-row eval gets the IDENTICAL recommendation set regardless of the question asked (U004/U015/U020/U021/U039/U046/U027). Eval reason strings map 1:1 to Services.recommendation_signals.

Data: vetc_track1_dataset_participants.xlsx (Users 50; Vehicles 50 with insurance/inspection/registration days-left + roadside/civil-liability status + route; Services 12 with eligibility+signals+priority+CTA; User_Activity 250; Content 30; Notification_Templates 6). Public_Evaluation 40 rows (expected_recommendation + reason); a Hidden_Evaluation exists - do NOT overfit.

New Part-1 primitive P2 needs vs P1: a proactive trigger/notification engine (deadline+signal monitor -> templated action). Harder than P1: output is a ranked SET (1-3 of 12) so ranking by priority + firing-signal count matters (set-overlap scoring).

COOPER-HARDENED + independently re-verified: the FIX-A rule engine = 40/40 on the public set (I re-ran it via verify_p2_fixA.py, not just cooper-reported). Refutation cooper CONFIRMED deterministic/state-driven/no-leak/ranking-sound and CORRECTED the prior pass: DocWallet is REGISTRATION-specific (inspection<45 OR registration<=60), NOT a uniform window-widen (U015/U020 have identical inspection=60 with opposite labels); the ROADSIDE km/segment clauses are dead weight (age>=3 alone = 40/40) so DELETE them; and a healthy user (nothing fires) returns an EMPTY recommendation -> add a fallback to Service Discovery/Loyalty (N004/N005).

Hidden-eval fragility (do NOT report 40/40 as the hidden expectation): the registration window is under-determined [61,179] = highest risk; then inspection window, the roadside age>=3 boundary, and insurance<30 (text-grounded only). LOCKED design section: docs/handoff/jobs/_briefs/cael-os-light-AGREEMENT-DRAFT-1.md section 5b.

execution_plan.goal_step: Build the eligibility rule-engine over the 12 Services (eligibility + recommendation_signals) x user/vehicle/activity state; join eval user_id -> Users + Vehicles + Activity and fire the matching rules
execution_plan.verify: the eligible-service set is computed deterministically per user from their state

execution_plan.goal_step: Rank + select top-N by priority (Cao/TrungBinh/Thap) + firing-signal count; output {recommended_services[], reason_per_service = the firing eligibility rule}
execution_plan.verify: reproduce the expected_recommendation set (set-overlap) on the 40-eval; report the deterministic %

execution_plan.goal_step: Proactive notification engine: deadline triggers on the vehicle fields (insurance_days_left<30 -> N001, inspection_due -> N003, registration, wallet-not-active -> N006, roadside-recommendation -> N002) mapping to the 6 templates
execution_plan.verify: the correct notification template fires for a given vehicle/user state

execution_plan.goal_step: Grounded conversational assistant wraps the engine (answers 'what services suit me' / 'do I need X' by running the eligibility engine and citing the firing rule); refuse-without-evidence; state-driven, not question-driven
execution_plan.verify: >=10 assistant conversations + >=10 recommendation scenarios; every recommendation cites its firing rule

execution_plan.goal_step: DESIGN NOT YET COOPER-HARDENED: lock after (a) the rule-engine-vs-40-eval validation (the P2 analogue of P1's 49/50 number) and (b) an independent refutation cooper (ranking anomalies + hidden-set traps), same discipline as Track 1
execution_plan.verify: validation run + cooper findings folded into this goal BEFORE the RADIO contract is authored

execution_plan.goal_step: VALIDATION run (rule-engine vs 40-eval): 82% exact set-match (33/40) + 0.917 mean Jaccard from a 3-user-calibrated engine -> recommendation CONFIRMED deterministic from user state. All 7 misses = fixable threshold calibration (DocWallet due-window 45->~60d; Insurance must also fire on insurance_days_left<30 even if status=active/expiring; Roadside age>=3), NO unfixable anomaly (unlike P1's P035).
execution_plan.verify: scratchpad/validate_p2_recommendations.py reproduces 33/40; refutation cooper pressure-tests threshold-generalization + over-recommend/eligibility-leak + hidden-set BEFORE the RADIO contract

execution_plan.goal_step: LOCKED (cooper-hardened, re-verified 40/40): the eligibility-gate design is in AGREEMENT-DRAFT-1.md section 5b (FIX-A rules + rank/cap-3 + fallback). At parity with Track 1; ready for a RADIO contract once the harness (Phase 0) is built.
execution_plan.verify: FIX-A reproduces 40/40 (verify_p2_fixA.py); design section 5b committed; per-user vehicle aggregation + no already-active recommendation in the build

success_criteria: Reproduce expected_recommendation on the 40-row Public_Evaluation (state-driven, eligibility-correct, cite the firing rule)
notification triggers fire on vehicle deadlines
do not overfit the hidden eval
goal_snapshot.surface_request: VETC Mobility Copilot: personalized eligibility-gated service recommendations + grounded assistant + proactive notifications; drive discovery/activation of Roadside, Civil-Liability-Insurance, etc.
goal_snapshot.title: Taco Track 2 (P2) - AI Mobility Growth & Engagement Platform [cael-os-light delivery]

hard_rejects: building against cael-os-light SOURCE (dogfood law: import the INSTALLED @cael/os-light tarball; any cael-os-light/** edit = red)
client data in the repo: no user/vehicle/service rows, no xlsx; runtime reads CAEL_P2_DATA_ROOT only; committed fixtures SYNTHETIC
eval-gaming: expected_recommendation reaching the scored fn in ANY form (the P1 round-1 tautology class); score inflation via question-conditioning (rules are question-INDEPENDENT)
overfitting the hidden eval: no widening/tightening beyond the text-grounded LOCKED rules (registration window [61,179] under-determined - do not guess); 40/40 reported as PUBLIC
first-vehicle shortcuts (per-user aggregation across ALL vehicles is law); empty recommendation (never-empty fallback is law)
secrets; 'demo' strings; real client names outside the permission gate; writes outside the fence; markdown cooper record; self-judge-close; foreground full-suite runs

inspect_before_merge: lane source delta confined to: packs/p2-eligibility/** (NEW) + showcase/content/** + manifest registration (registry.ts two-line class only) + docs/handoff/jobs/<lane jobs>/** + lane-normal goal/lane state; ZERO writes to cael-os-light/**, cael.agent.os/**, v3/**, boot artifacts
T2 report present at 40/40 with the anti-gaming probe documented; RADIO re-scans the diff for client data
aggregation + fallback + question-independence evidence in the lane report; BUILD record attached or MAIN-parked

out_of_scope: tracks P3-P12; P4 engagement layer (mission/XP semantics are P4's, not P2's)
real-adapter TRY wiring; Vercel owner clicks (tomorrow, with Kajima watching live)
showcase layout changes beyond P2 content + manifest registration (port law)

do not overfit the hidden eval

Per-user vehicle aggregation, rank+cap-3+never-empty fallback, text-grounded rules ONLY (hidden-eval discipline: registration window under-determined), notification template alignment with corrected copies + documented source misalignments.
